original_image_tags: Stamped "MAILED 19 / DEC 27 1966 / COMM-FBI" in red ink.
Vertical red stamp reading "REC'D READING ROOM / DEC 27 3 25 PM '67".
Large vertical red stamp at bottom left reading "REC'D / JAN 10 1967".

elements.description: Typed letter dated December 27, 1966, addressed to Miss Judith Goodman in Bradford, Pennsylvania. The letter states that matters pertaining to Unidentified Flying Objects are not within the jurisdiction of the FBI and that a copy has been referred to the Department of the Air Force. Signed by J. Edgar Hoover. Includes a note regarding file records and referral.

Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations are visible on the page. A red stamp reads 'MAILED 19 DEC 27 1966 COMM-FBI'. A blue stamp on the right edge reads 'DEC 27 3:25 PM '66 REC'D - READING ROOM'. Handwritten notes include 'REC-48 62-83894-455', 'EX-108', '52 JAN 10 1967', and various initials or short scribbles at the bottom and right edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of multiple stamps with similar text, but Description B adds unverified details (handwritten notes, blue stamp) not present in Description A, without direct contradiction on quoted stamp text.
